title: Cavril Maestro — Adaptive Music Director
description: Standalone adaptive, generative, beat-synchronized soundscape engine with Calm/Tension moods and a GM Director panel. System-agnostic. Audio engine ported from Ember's soundscape system; bring your own audio assets via a configurable base path.

cavril-maestro.note: Audio is NOT bundled. Set the 'Audio Asset Base Path' world setting to the folder holding your music/ environment/ weather/ effects subfolders (e.g. a Forge Assets Library URL).
